import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if string.len(current) > 0
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(current) > 0
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  for v in xs
    if v == target and not removed
      removed = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(string.trim(line1))
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
let take = if k < sorted.len()
  k
else
  sorted.len()
end

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    if i == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
